Details: Set map variable to random value in [min, max] range.

Semantics.SummaryLong: Uses global RNG table FUN_007a4330: value = rand * GenericVar2 + GenericVar1 (after abs on GenericVar1). Writes via FUN_005afbc0.

Details: Complete current mission objective for mission id.

Semantics.SummaryLong: FUN_00533f90(missionId, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0xFFFFFFFF, 1) advances objective chain, grants rewards/XP/credits, may show "Completed!" UI. ObjectiveIDCheck in map file is validated in CanTrigger, not passed to handler.

Text.Main: You found a tooth. The foul smell issuing from the large cavities all over it make you want to polish your enhanced masticating surfaces.
You found an almost unused toothbrush. Regardless of whether it's Ma-Mary's or Raiders, this item is not worth keeping.
You found a gigantic gray-plastic mug. The long crack in the side makes this item useless.
You found a handful of damp fluff. This item is not worth keeping.
You found a wrapper from something called Ghengiz's Goretusk-Liver Pie. This item is not worth keeping.
You cut your organic finger on a small shard of glass. It may be time for that full-hand enhancement... This item is not worth keeping.

You found a small clump of twine. It is cut into tiny lengths that would serve virtually no purpose, though you remember hearing something about Stringettes being used in hospitals... On reflection, this item is not worth keeping.
Something bit you! Upon close inspection, you find three holes in an equilateral triangle and feel a tingling in that arm. Nothing else *seems* wrong, however.
You have found a mismatched pair of shoes. These must be the ones Raider is looking for!
You found a comb. Close inspection reveals some mutated lice and bear a close resemblance to tiny Crawlers. This item is not worth keeping.
You found a hair clog. Raider or Ma-Mary must have pulled it out of the sink recently. This item is not worth keeping.

You find some large flakes of rust. One of them punctures the skin of an exposed finger and you feel the instant pain elsewhere as a Tetanus Booster is automatically activated. 

The rust flakes are not worth keeping.
You find an Osterake feather that shows signs of Rake-rust contagion. This item is not worth keeping.
You found a piece of waffle so moldy that even Raider would thrown it away. This item is not worth keeping.
You found nothing in your search.
[$emote]Raider looks at you oddly, obviously wondering what you're looking for...[$/emote]
